changes.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: 添加 forward-compat 支持 为了 `gpt-5.4-pro`, including Codex pricing/limits 和 list/status visibility 之前 the upstream catalog catches up. (#66453) Thanks @jepson-liu.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: add forward-compat support for `gpt-5.4-pro`, including Codex pricing/limits and list/status visibility before the upstream catalog catches up. (#66453) Thanks @jepson-liu.

changes.title: Telegram/forum topics: surface human topic names 在 Agent context, prompt metadata, 和 插件 hook metadata 通过 learning names 从 Telegram forum service messages. (#65973) Thanks @ptahdunbar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: surface human topic names in agent context, prompt metadata, and plugin hook metadata by learning names from Telegram forum service messages. (#65973) Thanks @ptahdunbar.

changes.title: Agent/Ollama: forward the configured embedded-run 超时 进入 the global undici stream 超时 tuning so slow local Ollama runs no longer inherit the default stream cutoff 而不是 the operator-set run 超时. (#63175) Thanks @mindcraftreader 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Ollama: forward the configured embedded-run timeout into the global undici stream timeout tuning so slow local Ollama runs no longer inherit the default stream cutoff instead of the operator-set run timeout. (#63175) Thanks @mindcraftreader and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型/Codex: include `apiKey` 在 the Codex provider catalog output so the Pi ModelRegistry validator no longer rejects the entry 和 静默地 drops all custom 模型 从 every provider 在 `模型.json`. (#66180) Thanks @hoyyeva.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Codex: include `apiKey` in the codex provider catalog output so the Pi ModelRegistry validator no longer rejects the entry and silently drops all custom models from every provider in `models.json`. (#66180) Thanks @hoyyeva.

changes.title: Tools/image+pdf: normalize configured provider/模型 refs 之前 media-工具 registry lookup so image 和 PDF 工具 runs 停止 rejecting valid Ollama vision 模型 as unknown just because the 工具 路径 skipped the usual 模型-ref normalization step. (#59943) Thanks @yqli2420 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/image+pdf: normalize configured provider/model refs before media-tool registry lookup so image and PDF tool runs stop rejecting valid Ollama vision models as unknown just because the tool path skipped the usual model-ref normalization step. (#59943) Thanks @yqli2420 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Slack/interactions: apply the configured global `allowFrom` owner allowlist to channel block-action 和 modal interactive events, require an expected sender id 为了 cross-verification, 和 reject ambiguous channel types so interactive triggers can no longer bypass the documented allowlist intent 在 channels 不适用 a `users` list. Open-通过-default behavior is preserved 当 no allowlists are configured. (#66028) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/interactions: apply the configured global `allowFrom` owner allowlist to channel block-action and modal interactive events, require an expected sender id for cross-verification, and reject ambiguous channel types so interactive triggers can no longer bypass the documented allowlist intent in channels without a `users` list. Open-by-default behavior is preserved when no allowlists are configured. (#66028) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Media-understanding/attachments: fail closed 当 a local attachment 路径 cannot be canonically resolved via `realpath`, so a `realpath` 错误 can no longer downgrade the canonical-roots allowlist check to a non-canonical comparison; attachments that also have a URL still fall back to the network fetch 路径. (#66022) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Media-understanding/attachments: fail closed when a local attachment path cannot be canonically resolved via `realpath`, so a `realpath` error can no longer downgrade the canonical-roots allowlist check to a non-canonical comparison; attachments that also have a URL still fall back to the network fetch path. (#66022) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Agent/网关-工具: reject `配置.patch` 和 `配置.apply` calls 从 the 模型-facing 网关 工具 当 they would newly 启用 any flag enumerated 通过 `openclaw 安全 audit` (为了 example `dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth`, `allowInsecureAuth`, `dangerouslyAllowHostHeaderOriginFallback`, `hooks.gmail.allowUnsafeExternalContent`, `tools.exec.applyPatch.workspaceOnly: false`); already-enabled flags pass through unchanged so non-dangerous edits 在 the same patch still apply, 和 direct authenticated operator RPC behavior is unchanged. (#62006) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/gateway-tool: reject `config.patch` and `config.apply` calls from the model-facing gateway tool when they would newly enable any flag enumerated by `openclaw security audit` (for example `dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth`, `allowInsecureAuth`, `dangerouslyAllowHostHeaderOriginFallback`, `hooks.gmail.allowUnsafeExternalContent`, `tools.exec.applyPatch.workspaceOnly: false`); already-enabled flags pass through unchanged so non-dangerous edits in the same patch still apply, and direct authenticated operator RPC behavior is unchanged. (#62006) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Google image generation: strip a trailing `/OpenAI` suffix 从 configured Google base URLs only 当 calling the native Gemini image API so Gemini image requests 停止 404ing 不适用 破坏性变更 explicit OpenAI-compatible Google endpoints. (#66445) Thanks @dapzthelegend.
changes.rawTitle: Google image generation: strip a trailing `/openai` suffix from configured Google base URLs only when calling the native Gemini image API so Gemini image requests stop 404ing without breaking explicit OpenAI-compatible Google endpoints. (#66445) Thanks @dapzthelegend.

changes.title: Telegram/forum topics: persist learned topic names to the Telegram session sidecar store so Agent context can keep using human topic names 之后 a restart 而不是 relearning 从 future service metadata. (#66107) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: persist learned topic names to the Telegram session sidecar store so agent context can keep using human topic names after a restart instead of relearning from future service metadata. (#66107) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 诊断工具/systemd: keep `openclaw 诊断工具 --repair` 和 service reinstall 从 re-embedding dotenv-backed secrets 在 user systemd units, while preserving newer inline overrides over stale state-dir `.env` values. (#66249) Thanks @tmimmanuel.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/systemd: keep `openclaw doctor --repair` and service reinstall from re-embedding dotenv-backed secrets in user systemd units, while preserving newer inline overrides over stale state-dir `.env` values. (#66249) Thanks @tmimmanuel.

changes.title: Ollama/OpenAI-compat: send `stream_options.include_usage` 为了 Ollama streaming completions so local Ollama runs report real usage 而不是 falling back to bogus prompt-令牌 counts that trigger premature compaction. (#64568) Thanks @xchunzhao 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/OpenAI-compat: send `stream_options.include_usage` for Ollama streaming completions so local Ollama runs report real usage instead of falling back to bogus prompt-token counts that trigger premature compaction. (#64568) Thanks @xchunzhao and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: cache external `preferOver` catalog lookups within each 插件 auto-启用 pass so large `Agent.list` configs no longer peg CPU 和 repeatedly reread 插件 catalogs 期间 诊断工具/插件 resolution. (#66246) Thanks @yfge.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: cache external `preferOver` catalog lookups within each plugin auto-enable pass so large `agents.list` configs no longer peg CPU and repeatedly reread plugin catalogs during doctor/plugins resolution. (#66246) Thanks @yfge.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/thinking: 允许 `GitHub-copilot/gpt-5.4` to use `xhigh` reasoning so Copilot GPT-5.4 matches the rest 的 the GPT-5.4 family. (#50168) Thanks @jakepresent 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/thinking: allow `github-copilot/gpt-5.4` to use `xhigh` reasoning so Copilot GPT-5.4 matches the rest of the GPT-5.4 family. (#50168) Thanks @jakepresent and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/embeddings: 保留 non-OpenAI provider prefixes 当 normalizing OpenAI-compatible embedding 模型 refs so 代理-backed 内存 providers 停止 failing 使用 `Unknown 内存 embedding provider`. (#66452) Thanks @jlapenna.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/embeddings: preserve non-OpenAI provider prefixes when normalizing OpenAI-compatible embedding model refs so proxy-backed memory providers stop failing with `Unknown memory embedding provider`. (#66452) Thanks @jlapenna.

changes.title: Agent/local 模型: clarify low-context preflight hints 为了 self-hosted 模型, point 配置-backed caps at the relevant OpenClaw 设置, 和 停止 suggesting larger 模型 当 `Agent.defaults.contextTokens` is the real limit. (#66236) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/local models: clarify low-context preflight hints for self-hosted models, point config-backed caps at the relevant OpenClaw setting, and stop suggesting larger models when `agents.defaults.contextTokens` is the real limit. (#66236) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: 浏览器/SSRF: restore hostname navigation under the default 浏览器 SSRF policy while keeping explicit strict mode reachable 从 配置, 和 keep managed loopback CDP `/json/new` fallback requests 在 the local CDP control policy so 浏览器 follow-up 修复 停止 regressing normal navigation 或 self-blocking local CDP control. (#66386) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/SSRF: restore hostname navigation under the default browser SSRF policy while keeping explicit strict mode reachable from config, and keep managed loopback CDP `/json/new` fallback requests on the local CDP control policy so browser follow-up fixes stop regressing normal navigation or self-blocking local CDP control. (#66386) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 模型/Codex: canonicalize the legacy `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.4-Codex` runtime alias to `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.4` while still honoring alias-specific 和 canonical per-模型 overrides. (#43060) Thanks @Sapientropic 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Codex: canonicalize the legacy `openai-codex/gpt-5.4-codex` runtime alias to `openai-codex/gpt-5.4` while still honoring alias-specific and canonical per-model overrides. (#43060) Thanks @Sapientropic and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 浏览器/SSRF: 保留 explicit strict 浏览器 navigation mode 为了 legacy `浏览器.ssrfPolicy.allowPrivateNetwork: false` configs 通过 normalizing the legacy alias to the canonical strict marker 而不是 静默地 widening those installs to the default non-strict hostname-navigation 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/SSRF: preserve explicit strict browser navigation mode for legacy `browser.ssrfPolicy.allowPrivateNetwork: false` configs by normalizing the legacy alias to the canonical strict marker instead of silently widening those installs to the default non-strict hostname-navigation path.

changes.title: Onboarding/custom providers: use `max_tokens=16` 为了 OpenAI-compatible verification probes so stricter custom endpoints 停止 rejecting onboarding checks that only need a tiny completion. (#66450) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/custom providers: use `max_tokens=16` for OpenAI-compatible verification probes so stricter custom endpoints stop rejecting onboarding checks that only need a tiny completion. (#66450) Thanks @WuKongAI-CMU.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: emit the subagent registry lazy-runtime stub 在 the stable dist 路径 that both source 和 bundled runtime imports 解决, so the follow-up dist 修复 no longer still fails 使用 `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` at runtime. (#66420) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: emit the subagent registry lazy-runtime stub on the stable dist path that both source and bundled runtime imports resolve, so the follow-up dist fix no longer still fails with `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` at runtime. (#66420) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Media-understanding/代理 env: auto-upgrade provider HTTP helper requests to trusted env-代理 mode only 当 `HTTP_PROXY`/`HTTPS_PROXY` is active 和 the target is not bypassed 通过 `NO_PROXY`, so remote media-understanding 和 transcription requests 停止 failing local DNS pre-resolution 在 代理-only environments 不适用 widening SSRF bypasses. (#52162) Thanks @mjamiv 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media-understanding/proxy env: auto-upgrade provider HTTP helper requests to trusted env-proxy mode only when `HTTP_PROXY`/`HTTPS_PROXY` is active and the target is not bypassed by `NO_PROXY`, so remote media-understanding and transcription requests stop failing local DNS pre-resolution in proxy-only environments without widening SSRF bypasses. (#52162) Thanks @mjamiv and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram/media downloads: let Telegram media fetches trust an operator-configured explicit 代理 为了 target DNS resolution 之后 hostname-policy checks, so 代理-backed installs 停止 failing `could not download media` 在 Bot API file downloads 之后 the DNS-pinning regression. (#66245) Thanks @dawei41468 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/media downloads: let Telegram media fetches trust an operator-configured explicit proxy for target DNS resolution after hostname-policy checks, so proxy-backed installs stop failing `could not download media` on Bot API file downloads after the DNS-pinning regression. (#66245) Thanks @dawei41468 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 浏览器: keep loopback CDP readiness checks reachable under strict SSRF defaults so OpenClaw can reconnect to locally started managed Chrome. (#66354) Thanks @hxy91819.
changes.rawTitle: Browser: keep loopback CDP readiness checks reachable under strict SSRF defaults so OpenClaw can reconnect to locally started managed Chrome. (#66354) Thanks @hxy91819.

changes.title: Agent/context engine: compact engine-owned sessions 从 the first 工具-loop delta 和 保留 ingest fallback 当 `afterTurn` is absent, so long-running 工具 loops can stay bounded 不适用 dropping engine state. (#63555) Thanks @Bikkies.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context engine: compact engine-owned sessions from the first tool-loop delta and preserve ingest fallback when `afterTurn` is absent, so long-running tool loops can stay bounded without dropping engine state. (#63555) Thanks @Bikkies.

changes.title: OpenAI Codex/认证: keep malformed Codex CLI 认证-file diagnostics 在 the debug logger 而不是 stdout so interactive 命令 output stays clean while 认证 read failures remain traceable. (#66451) Thanks @SimbaKingjoe.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/auth: keep malformed Codex CLI auth-file diagnostics on the debug logger instead of stdout so interactive command output stays clean while auth read failures remain traceable. (#66451) Thanks @SimbaKingjoe.

changes.title: Discord/native commands: return the real status card 为了 native `/status` interactions 而不是 falling through to the synthetic `✅ Done.` ack 当 the generic dispatcher produces no visible reply. (#54629) Thanks @tkozzer 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/native commands: return the real status card for native `/status` interactions instead of falling through to the synthetic `✅ Done.` ack when the generic dispatcher produces no visible reply. (#54629) Thanks @tkozzer and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Hooks/Ollama: let LLM-backed session-内存 slug generation honor an explicit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` override 而不是 always aborting 之后 15 seconds, so slow local Ollama runs 停止 静默地 dropping back to generic filenames. (#66237) Thanks @dmak 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/Ollama: let LLM-backed session-memory slug generation honor an explicit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` override instead of always aborting after 15 seconds, so slow local Ollama runs stop silently dropping back to generic filenames. (#66237) Thanks @dmak and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/transcription: remap `.aac` filenames to `.m4a` 为了 OpenAI-compatible audio uploads so AAC 语音 notes 停止 failing MIME-sensitive transcription endpoints. (#66446) Thanks @ben-z.
changes.rawTitle: Media/transcription: remap `.aac` filenames to `.m4a` for OpenAI-compatible audio uploads so AAC voice notes stop failing MIME-sensitive transcription endpoints. (#66446) Thanks @ben-z.

changes.title: 界面/chat: replace marked.js 使用 markdown-it so maliciously crafted markdown can no longer freeze the Control 界面 via ReDoS. (#46707) Thanks @zhangfnf.
changes.rawTitle: UI/chat: replace marked.js with markdown-it so maliciously crafted markdown can no longer freeze the Control UI via ReDoS. (#46707) Thanks @zhangfnf.

changes.title: Auto-reply/send policy: keep `sendPolicy: "deny"` 从 blocking inbound message processing, so the Agent still runs its turn while all outbound delivery is suppressed 为了 observer-style setups. (#65461, #53328) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/send policy: keep `sendPolicy: "deny"` from blocking inbound message processing, so the agent still runs its turn while all outbound delivery is suppressed for observer-style setups. (#65461, #53328) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: BlueBubbles: lazy-refresh the Private API server-info cache 在 send 当 reply threading 或 message effects are requested 但是 status is unknown, so sends no longer 静默地 degrade to plain messages 当 the 10-minute cache expires. (#65447, #43764) Thanks @omarshahine.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: lazy-refresh the Private API server-info cache on send when reply threading or message effects are requested but status is unknown, so sends no longer silently degrade to plain messages when the 10-minute cache expires. (#65447, #43764) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: Heartbeat/安全: force owner downgrade 为了 untrusted `hook:wake` system events [AI-assisted]. (#66031) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat/security: force owner downgrade for untrusted `hook:wake` system events [AI-assisted]. (#66031) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 浏览器/安全: enforce SSRF policy 在 snapshot, screenshot, 和 tab routes [AI]. (#66040) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/security: enforce SSRF policy on snapshot, screenshot, and tab routes [AI]. (#66040) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Microsoft Teams/安全: enforce sender allowlist checks 在 SSO signin invokes [AI]. (#66033) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams/security: enforce sender allowlist checks on SSO signin invokes [AI]. (#66033) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 配置/安全: redact `sourceConfig` 和 `runtimeConfig` alias fields 在 `redactConfigSnapshot` [AI]. (#66030) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Config/security: redact `sourceConfig` and `runtimeConfig` alias fields in `redactConfigSnapshot` [AI]. (#66030) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Agent/context engines: run opt-在 turn maintenance as idle-aware background work so the next foreground turn no longer waits 在 proactive maintenance. (#65233) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context engines: run opt-in turn maintenance as idle-aware background work so the next foreground turn no longer waits on proactive maintenance. (#65233) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: 插件/status: report the registered context-engine IDs 在 `插件 inspect` 而不是 the owning 插件 ID, so non-matching engine IDs 和 multi-engine 插件 are classified 正确地. (#58766) Thanks @zhuisDEV.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/status: report the registered context-engine IDs in `plugins inspect` instead of the owning plugin ID, so non-matching engine IDs and multi-engine plugins are classified correctly. (#58766) Thanks @zhuisDEV.

changes.title: Context engines: reject resolved 插件 engines whose reported `info.id` does not match their registered slot id, so malformed engines fail fast 之前 id-based runtime branches can misbehave. (#63222) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Context engines: reject resolved plugin engines whose reported `info.id` does not match their registered slot id, so malformed engines fail fast before id-based runtime branches can misbehave. (#63222) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: WhatsApp: patch installed Baileys media encryption writes 期间 OpenClaw postinstall so the default npm/install.sh delivery 路径 waits 为了 encrypted media files to finish flushing 之前 readback, avoiding transient `ENOENT` crashes 在 image sends. (#65896) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: patch installed Baileys media encryption writes during OpenClaw postinstall so the default npm/install.sh delivery path waits for encrypted media files to finish flushing before readback, avoiding transient `ENOENT` crashes on image sends. (#65896) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: 网关/更新: unify service entrypoint resolution around the canonical bundled 网关 entrypoint so 更新, reinstall, 和 诊断工具 repair 停止 drifting 之间 stale `dist/entry.js` 和 current `dist/index.js` paths. (#65984) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: unify service entrypoint resolution around the canonical bundled gateway entrypoint so update, reinstall, and doctor repair stop drifting between stale `dist/entry.js` and current `dist/index.js` paths. (#65984) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Heartbeat/Telegram topics: keep isolated heartbeat replies 在 the bound forum topic 当 `target=last`, 而不是 dropping them 进入 the group root chat. (#66035) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat/Telegram topics: keep isolated heartbeat replies on the bound forum topic when `target=last`, instead of dropping them into the group root chat. (#66035) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: 浏览器/CDP: let managed local Chrome readiness, status probes, 和 managed loopback CDP control bypass 浏览器 SSRF policy 为了 their own loopback control plane, so OpenClaw no longer misclassifies a healthy child 浏览器 as "not reachable 之后 start". (#65695, #66043) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: let managed local Chrome readiness, status probes, and managed loopback CDP control bypass browser SSRF policy for their own loopback control plane, so OpenClaw no longer misclassifies a healthy child browser as "not reachable after start". (#65695, #66043) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: 停止 heartbeat, cron-event, 和 exec-event turns 从 overwriting shared-session routing 和 origin metadata, preventing synthetic `heartbeat` targets 从 poisoning later cron 或 user delivery. (#66073, #63733, #35300) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: stop heartbeat, cron-event, and exec-event turns from overwriting shared-session routing and origin metadata, preventing synthetic `heartbeat` targets from poisoning later cron or user delivery. (#66073, #63733, #35300) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: 浏览器/CDP: let local attach-only `manual-cdp` profiles 复用 the local loopback CDP control plane under strict default policy 和 remote-class probe timeouts, so tabs/snapshot 停止 falsely reporting a live local 浏览器 session as not running. (#65611, #66080) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: let local attach-only `manual-cdp` profiles reuse the local loopback CDP control plane under strict default policy and remote-class probe timeouts, so tabs/snapshot stop falsely reporting a live local browser session as not running. (#65611, #66080) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Cron/scheduler: 停止 inventing short retries 当 cron next-run calculation returns no valid future slot, 和 keep a maintenance wake armed so enabled unscheduled jobs recover 不适用 entering a refire loop. (#66019, #66083) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/scheduler: stop inventing short retries when cron next-run calculation returns no valid future slot, and keep a maintenance wake armed so enabled unscheduled jobs recover without entering a refire loop. (#66019, #66083) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Cron/scheduler: 保留 the active 错误-backoff floor 当 maintenance repair recomputes a missing cron next-run, so recurring errored jobs do not resume early 之后 a transient next-run resolution failure. (#66019, #66083, #66113) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/scheduler: preserve the active error-backoff floor when maintenance repair recomputes a missing cron next-run, so recurring errored jobs do not resume early after a transient next-run resolution failure. (#66019, #66083, #66113) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Outbound/delivery-queue: persist the originating outbound `session` context 在 queued delivery entries 和 replay it 期间 recovery, so write-ahead-queued sends keep their original outbound media policy context 之后 restart 而不是 evaluating against a missing session. (#66025) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Outbound/delivery-queue: persist the originating outbound `session` context on queued delivery entries and replay it during recovery, so write-ahead-queued sends keep their original outbound media policy context after restart instead of evaluating against a missing session. (#66025) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 内存/Ollama: restore the built-在 `ollama` embedding adapter 在 内存-core so explicit `memorySearch.provider: "ollama"` works 重新, 和 include endpoint-aware cache keys so different Ollama hosts do not 复用 each other's embeddings. (#63429, #66078, #66163) Thanks @nnish16 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/Ollama: restore the built-in `ollama` embedding adapter in memory-core so explicit `memorySearch.provider: "ollama"` works again, and include endpoint-aware cache keys so different Ollama hosts do not reuse each other's embeddings. (#63429, #66078, #66163) Thanks @nnish16 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Auto-reply/queue: split collect-mode followup drains 进入 contiguous groups 通过 per-message authorization context (sender id, owner status, exec/bash-elevated overrides), so queued items 从 different senders 或 exec configs no longer execute under the last queued run's owner-only 和 exec-approval context. (#66024) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/queue: split collect-mode followup drains into contiguous groups by per-message authorization context (sender id, owner status, exec/bash-elevated overrides), so queued items from different senders or exec configs no longer execute under the last queued run's owner-only and exec-approval context. (#66024) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Dreaming/内存-core: require a live queued Dreaming cron event 之前 the heartbeat hook runs the sweep, so managed Dreaming no longer replays 在 later heartbeats 之后 the scheduled run was already consumed. (#66139) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: require a live queued Dreaming cron event before the heartbeat hook runs the sweep, so managed Dreaming no longer replays on later heartbeats after the scheduled run was already consumed. (#66139) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面/Dreaming: 停止 Imported Insights 和 内存 Palace 从 calling optional `内存-wiki` 网关 methods 当 the 插件 is off, 和 refresh 配置 之前 wiki reloads so the Dreaming tab stops showing misleading unknown-method failures. (#66140) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Dreaming: stop Imported Insights and Memory Palace from calling optional `memory-wiki` gateway methods when the plugin is off, and refresh config before wiki reloads so the Dreaming tab stops showing misleading unknown-method failures. (#66140) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Agent/tools: only mark streamed unknown-工具 retries as counted 当 a streamed message actually classifies an unavailable 工具, 和 keep incomplete streamed 工具 names 从 resetting the 重试 streak 之前 the final assistant message arrives. (#66145) Thanks @dutifulbob.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: only mark streamed unknown-tool retries as counted when a streamed message actually classifies an unavailable tool, and keep incomplete streamed tool names from resetting the retry streak before the final assistant message arrives. (#66145) Thanks @dutifulbob.

changes.title: 内存/active-内存: move recalled 内存 onto the hidden untrusted prompt-prefix 路径 而不是 system prompt injection, label the visible Active 内存 status line fields, 和 include the resolved recall provider/模型 在 网关 debug logs so trace/debug output matches what the 模型 actually saw. (#66144) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/active-memory: move recalled memory onto the hidden untrusted prompt-prefix path instead of system prompt injection, label the visible Active Memory status line fields, and include the resolved recall provider/model in gateway debug logs so trace/debug output matches what the model actually saw. (#66144) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 停止 treating legacy lowercase `内存.md` as a second default root collection, so QMD recall no longer searches phantom `内存-alt-*` collections 和 builtin/QMD root-内存 fallback stays aligned. (#66141) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: stop treating legacy lowercase `memory.md` as a second default root collection, so QMD recall no longer searches phantom `memory-alt-*` collections and builtin/QMD root-memory fallback stays aligned. (#66141) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: ship `dist/Agent/subagent-registry.runtime.js` 在 npm builds so `runtime: "subagent"` runs 停止 stalling 在 `queued` 之后 the registry import fails. (#66189) Thanks @yqli2420 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: ship `dist/agents/subagent-registry.runtime.js` in npm builds so `runtime: "subagent"` runs stop stalling in `queued` after the registry import fails. (#66189) Thanks @yqli2420 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: map `minimal` thinking to OpenAI's supported `low` reasoning effort 为了 GPT-5.4 requests, so embedded runs 停止 failing request validation. Thanks @steipete.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: map `minimal` thinking to OpenAI's supported `low` reasoning effort for GPT-5.4 requests, so embedded runs stop failing request validation. Thanks @steipete.

changes.title: 语音-call/media-stream: 解决 the source IP 从 trusted forwarding headers 为了 per-IP pending-connection limits 当 `webhookSecurity.trustForwardingHeaders` 和 `trustedProxyIPs` are configured, 和 reserve `maxConnections` capacity 为了 在-flight WebSocket upgrades so concurrent handshakes can no longer momentarily exceed the operator-set cap. (#66027) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Voice-call/media-stream: resolve the source IP from trusted forwarding headers for per-IP pending-connection limits when `webhookSecurity.trustForwardingHeaders` and `trustedProxyIPs` are configured, and reserve `maxConnections` capacity for in-flight WebSocket upgrades so concurrent handshakes can no longer momentarily exceed the operator-set cap. (#66027) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 飞书/allowlist: canonicalize allowlist entries 通过 explicit `user`/`chat` kind, strip repeated `飞书:`/`lark:` provider prefixes, 和 停止 folding opaque 飞书 IDs to lowercase, so allowlist matching no longer crosses user/chat namespaces 或 widens to case-insensitive ID matches the operator did not intend. (#66021) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/allowlist: canonicalize allowlist entries by explicit `user`/`chat` kind, strip repeated `feishu:`/`lark:` provider prefixes, and stop folding opaque Feishu IDs to lowercase, so allowlist matching no longer crosses user/chat namespaces or widens to case-insensitive ID matches the operator did not intend. (#66021) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Telegram/status commands: let read-only status slash commands bypass busy topic turns, while keeping `/export-session` 在 the normal lane so it cannot interleave 使用 an 在-flight session mutation. (#66226) Thanks @VACInc 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/status commands: let read-only status slash commands bypass busy topic turns, while keeping `/export-session` on the normal lane so it cannot interleave with an in-flight session mutation. (#66226) Thanks @VACInc and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TTS/reply media: persist OpenClaw temp 语音 outputs 进入 managed outbound media 和 允许 them through reply-media normalization, so 语音-note replies 停止 静默地 dropping. (#63511) Thanks @jetd1.
changes.rawTitle: TTS/reply media: persist OpenClaw temp voice outputs into managed outbound media and allow them through reply-media normalization, so voice-note replies stop silently dropping. (#63511) Thanks @jetd1.

changes.title: Agent/tools: treat Windows drive-letter paths (`C:\\...`) as absolute 当 resolving sandbox 和 read-工具 paths so workspace root is not prepended under POSIX 路径 rules. (#54039) Thanks @ly85206559 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: treat Windows drive-letter paths (`C:\\...`) as absolute when resolving sandbox and read-tool paths so workspace root is not prepended under POSIX path rules. (#54039) Thanks @ly85206559 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: recover embedded GPT-style runs 当 reasoning-only 或 empty turns need bounded continuation, 使用 replay-safe 重试 gating 和 incomplete-turn fallback 当 no visible answer arrives. (#66167) thanks @jalehman
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: recover embedded GPT-style runs when reasoning-only or empty turns need bounded continuation, with replay-safe retry gating and incomplete-turn fallback when no visible answer arrives. (#66167) thanks @jalehman

changes.title: Outbound/relay-status: suppress internal relay-status placeholder payloads (`No channel reply.`, `Replied 在-thread.`, `Replied 在 #...`, wiki-更新 status variants ending 在 `No channel reply.`) 之前 channel delivery so internal housekeeping text does not leak to users.
changes.rawTitle: Outbound/relay-status: suppress internal relay-status placeholder payloads (`No channel reply.`, `Replied in-thread.`, `Replied in #...`, wiki-update status variants ending in `No channel reply.`) before channel delivery so internal housekeeping text does not leak to users.

changes.title: Slack/诊断工具: 添加 a dedicated 诊断工具-contract sidecar so 配置 warmup paths such as `openclaw cron` no longer fall back to Slack's broader contract surface, which could trigger Slack-related 配置-read crashes 在 affected setups. (#63192) Thanks @shhtheonlyperson.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/doctor: add a dedicated doctor-contract sidecar so config warmup paths such as `openclaw cron` no longer fall back to Slack's broader contract surface, which could trigger Slack-related config-read crashes on affected setups. (#63192) Thanks @shhtheonlyperson.

changes.title: Hooks/session-内存: pass the resolved Agent workspace 进入 网关 `/new` 和 `/reset` session-内存 hooks so reset snapshots stay scoped to the right Agent workspace 而不是 leaking 进入 the default workspace. (#64735) Thanks @suboss87 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session-memory: pass the resolved agent workspace into gateway `/new` and `/reset` session-memory hooks so reset snapshots stay scoped to the right agent workspace instead of leaking into the default workspace. (#64735) Thanks @suboss87 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/approvals: raise the default `openclaw approvals get` 网关 超时 和 report 配置-load timeouts explicitly, so slow hosts 停止 showing a misleading `配置 unavailable.` note 当 the approvals snapshot succeeds 但是 the follow-up 配置 RPC needs more time. (#66239) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/approvals: raise the default `openclaw approvals get` gateway timeout and report config-load timeouts explicitly, so slow hosts stop showing a misleading `Config unavailable.` note when the approvals snapshot succeeds but the follow-up config RPC needs more time. (#66239) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Media/store: honor configured Agent media limits 当 saving generated media 和 persisting outbound reply media, so the store no longer hard-stops those flows at 5 MB 之前 the configured limit applies. (#66229) Thanks @neeravmakwana 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media/store: honor configured agent media limits when saving generated media and persisting outbound reply media, so the store no longer hard-stops those flows at 5 MB before the configured limit applies. (#66229) Thanks @neeravmakwana and @vincentkoc.

items.title: OpenAI Codex/模型: 添加 forward-compat 支持 为了 `gpt-5.4-pro`, including Codex pricing/limits 和 list/status visibility 之前 the upstream catalog catches up. (#66453) Thanks @jepson-liu.
items.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex/models: add forward-compat support for `gpt-5.4-pro`, including Codex pricing/limits and list/status visibility before the upstream catalog catches up. (#66453) Thanks @jepson-liu.

items.title: Agent/Ollama: forward the configured embedded-run 超时 进入 the global undici stream 超时 tuning so slow local Ollama runs no longer inherit the default stream cutoff 而不是 the operator-set run 超时. (#63175) Thanks @mindcraftreader 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Ollama: forward the configured embedded-run timeout into the global undici stream timeout tuning so slow local Ollama runs no longer inherit the default stream cutoff instead of the operator-set run timeout. (#63175) Thanks @mindcraftreader and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/网关-工具: reject `配置.patch` 和 `配置.apply` calls 从 the 模型-facing 网关 工具 当 they would newly 启用 any flag enumerated 通过 `openclaw 安全 audit` (为了 example `dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth`, `allowInsecureAuth`, `dangerouslyAllowHostHeaderOriginFallback`, `hooks.gmail.allowUnsafeExternalContent`, `tools.exec.applyPatch.workspaceOnly: false`); already-enabled flags pass through unchanged so non-dangerous edits 在 the same patch still apply, 和 direct authenticated operator RPC behavior is unchanged. (#62006) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Agents/gateway-tool: reject `config.patch` and `config.apply` calls from the model-facing gateway tool when they would newly enable any flag enumerated by `openclaw security audit` (for example `dangerouslyDisableDeviceAuth`, `allowInsecureAuth`, `dangerouslyAllowHostHeaderOriginFallback`, `hooks.gmail.allowUnsafeExternalContent`, `tools.exec.applyPatch.workspaceOnly: false`); already-enabled flags pass through unchanged so non-dangerous edits in the same patch still apply, and direct authenticated operator RPC behavior is unchanged. (#62006) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Google image generation: strip a trailing `/OpenAI` suffix 从 configured Google base URLs only 当 calling the native Gemini image API so Gemini image requests 停止 404ing 不适用 破坏性变更 explicit OpenAI-compatible Google endpoints. (#66445) Thanks @dapzthelegend.
items.rawTitle: Google image generation: strip a trailing `/openai` suffix from configured Google base URLs only when calling the native Gemini image API so Gemini image requests stop 404ing without breaking explicit OpenAI-compatible Google endpoints. (#66445) Thanks @dapzthelegend.

items.title: GitHub Copilot/thinking: 允许 `GitHub-copilot/gpt-5.4` to use `xhigh` reasoning so Copilot GPT-5.4 matches the rest 的 the GPT-5.4 family. (#50168) Thanks @jakepresent 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/thinking: allow `github-copilot/gpt-5.4` to use `xhigh` reasoning so Copilot GPT-5.4 matches the rest of the GPT-5.4 family. (#50168) Thanks @jakepresent and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 模型/Codex: canonicalize the legacy `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.4-Codex` runtime alias to `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.4` while still honoring alias-specific 和 canonical per-模型 overrides. (#43060) Thanks @Sapientropic 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Models/Codex: canonicalize the legacy `openai-codex/gpt-5.4-codex` runtime alias to `openai-codex/gpt-5.4` while still honoring alias-specific and canonical per-model overrides. (#43060) Thanks @Sapientropic and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Hooks/Ollama: let LLM-backed session-内存 slug generation honor an explicit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` override 而不是 always aborting 之后 15 seconds, so slow local Ollama runs 停止 静默地 dropping back to generic filenames. (#66237) Thanks @dmak 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Hooks/Ollama: let LLM-backed session-memory slug generation honor an explicit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` override instead of always aborting after 15 seconds, so slow local Ollama runs stop silently dropping back to generic filenames. (#66237) Thanks @dmak and @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: UI/chat: replace marked.js with markdown-it so maliciously crafted markdown can no longer freeze the Control UI via ReDoS. (#46707) Thanks @zhangfnf.

items.title: Telegram/forum topics: surface human topic names 在 Agent context, prompt metadata, 和 插件 hook metadata 通过 learning names 从 Telegram forum service messages. (#65973) Thanks @ptahdunbar.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: surface human topic names in agent context, prompt metadata, and plugin hook metadata by learning names from Telegram forum service messages. (#65973) Thanks @ptahdunbar.

items.title: Slack/interactions: apply the configured global `allowFrom` owner allowlist to channel block-action 和 modal interactive events, require an expected sender id 为了 cross-verification, 和 reject ambiguous channel types so interactive triggers can no longer bypass the documented allowlist intent 在 channels 不适用 a `users` list. Open-通过-default behavior is preserved 当 no allowlists are configured. (#66028) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Slack/interactions: apply the configured global `allowFrom` owner allowlist to channel block-action and modal interactive events, require an expected sender id for cross-verification, and reject ambiguous channel types so interactive triggers can no longer bypass the documented allowlist intent in channels without a `users` list. Open-by-default behavior is preserved when no allowlists are configured. (#66028) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Telegram/forum topics: persist learned topic names to the Telegram session sidecar store so Agent context can keep using human topic names 之后 a restart 而不是 relearning 从 future service metadata. (#66107) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: persist learned topic names to the Telegram session sidecar store so agent context can keep using human topic names after a restart instead of relearning from future service metadata. (#66107) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Telegram/media downloads: let Telegram media fetches trust an operator-configured explicit 代理 为了 target DNS resolution 之后 hostname-policy checks, so 代理-backed installs 停止 failing `could not download media` 在 Bot API file downloads 之后 the DNS-pinning regression. (#66245) Thanks @dawei41468 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/media downloads: let Telegram media fetches trust an operator-configured explicit proxy for target DNS resolution after hostname-policy checks, so proxy-backed installs stop failing `could not download media` on Bot API file downloads after the DNS-pinning regression. (#66245) Thanks @dawei41468 and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Discord/native commands: return the real status card 为了 native `/status` interactions 而不是 falling through to the synthetic `✅ Done.` ack 当 the generic dispatcher produces no visible reply. (#54629) Thanks @tkozzer 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Discord/native commands: return the real status card for native `/status` interactions instead of falling through to the synthetic `✅ Done.` ack when the generic dispatcher produces no visible reply. (#54629) Thanks @tkozzer and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Auto-reply/send policy: keep `sendPolicy: "deny"` 从 blocking inbound message processing, so the Agent still runs its turn while all outbound delivery is suppressed 为了 observer-style setups. (#65461, #53328) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/send policy: keep `sendPolicy: "deny"` from blocking inbound message processing, so the agent still runs its turn while all outbound delivery is suppressed for observer-style setups. (#65461, #53328) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: BlueBubbles: lazy-refresh the Private API server-info cache 在 send 当 reply threading 或 message effects are requested 但是 status is unknown, so sends no longer 静默地 degrade to plain messages 当 the 10-minute cache expires. (#65447, #43764) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: BlueBubbles: lazy-refresh the Private API server-info cache on send when reply threading or message effects are requested but status is unknown, so sends no longer silently degrade to plain messages when the 10-minute cache expires. (#65447, #43764) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: WhatsApp: patch installed Baileys media encryption writes 期间 OpenClaw postinstall so the default npm/install.sh delivery 路径 waits 为了 encrypted media files to finish flushing 之前 readback, avoiding transient `ENOENT` crashes 在 image sends. (#65896) Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp: patch installed Baileys media encryption writes during OpenClaw postinstall so the default npm/install.sh delivery path waits for encrypted media files to finish flushing before readback, avoiding transient `ENOENT` crashes on image sends. (#65896) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Heartbeat/Telegram topics: keep isolated heartbeat replies 在 the bound forum topic 当 `target=last`, 而不是 dropping them 进入 the group root chat. (#66035) Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat/Telegram topics: keep isolated heartbeat replies on the bound forum topic when `target=last`, instead of dropping them into the group root chat. (#66035) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Auto-reply/queue: split collect-mode followup drains 进入 contiguous groups 通过 per-message authorization context (sender id, owner status, exec/bash-elevated overrides), so queued items 从 different senders 或 exec configs no longer execute under the last queued run's owner-only 和 exec-approval context. (#66024) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/queue: split collect-mode followup drains into contiguous groups by per-message authorization context (sender id, owner status, exec/bash-elevated overrides), so queued items from different senders or exec configs no longer execute under the last queued run's owner-only and exec-approval context. (#66024) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Agent/tools: only mark streamed unknown-工具 retries as counted 当 a streamed message actually classifies an unavailable 工具, 和 keep incomplete streamed 工具 names 从 resetting the 重试 streak 之前 the final assistant message arrives. (#66145) Thanks @dutifulbob.
items.rawTitle: Agents/tools: only mark streamed unknown-tool retries as counted when a streamed message actually classifies an unavailable tool, and keep incomplete streamed tool names from resetting the retry streak before the final assistant message arrives. (#66145) Thanks @dutifulbob.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: recover embedded GPT-style runs 当 reasoning-only 或 empty turns need bounded continuation, 使用 replay-safe 重试 gating 和 incomplete-turn fallback 当 no visible answer arrives. (#66167) thanks @jalehman

(#66027) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 浏览器/CDP: let managed local Chrome readiness, status probes, 和 managed loopback CDP control bypass 浏览器 SSRF policy 为了 their own loopback control plane, so OpenClaw no longer misclassifies a healthy child 浏览器 as "not reachable 之后 start". (#65695, #66043) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.rawTitle: Context engines: reject resolved plugin engines whose reported `info.id` does not match their registered slot id, so malformed engines fail fast before id-based runtime branches can misbehave. (#63222) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

items.title: Control 界面/Dreaming: 停止 Imported Insights 和 内存 Palace 从 calling optional `内存-wiki` 网关 methods 当 the 插件 is off, 和 refresh 配置 之前 wiki reloads so the Dreaming tab stops showing misleading unknown-method failures. (#66140) Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Dreaming: stop Imported Insights and Memory Palace from calling optional `memory-wiki` gateway methods when the plugin is off, and refresh config before wiki reloads so the Dreaming tab stops showing misleading unknown-method failures. (#66140) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: 网关/sessions: 停止 heartbeat, cron-event, 和 exec-event turns 从 overwriting shared-session routing 和 origin metadata, preventing synthetic `heartbeat` targets 从 poisoning later cron 或 user delivery. (#66073, #63733, #35300) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Cron/scheduler: 停止 inventing short retries 当 cron next-run calculation returns no valid future slot, 和 keep a maintenance wake armed so enabled unscheduled jobs recover 不适用 entering a refire loop. (#66019, #66083) Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Cron/scheduler: stop inventing short retries when cron next-run calculation returns no valid future slot, and keep a maintenance wake armed so enabled unscheduled jobs recover without entering a refire loop. (#66019, #66083) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Cron/scheduler: 保留 the active 错误-backoff floor 当 maintenance repair recomputes a missing cron next-run, so recurring errored jobs do not resume early 之后 a transient next-run resolution failure. (#66019, #66083, #66113) Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Cron/scheduler: preserve the active error-backoff floor when maintenance repair recomputes a missing cron next-run, so recurring errored jobs do not resume early after a transient next-run resolution failure. (#66019, #66083, #66113) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Outbound/delivery-queue: persist the originating outbound `session` context 在 queued delivery entries 和 replay it 期间 recovery, so write-ahead-queued sends keep their original outbound media policy context 之后 restart 而不是 evaluating against a missing session. (#66025) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Outbound/delivery-queue: persist the originating outbound `session` context on queued delivery entries and replay it during recovery, so write-ahead-queued sends keep their original outbound media policy context after restart instead of evaluating against a missing session. items.title: Dreaming/内存-core: require a live queued Dreaming cron event 之前 the heartbeat hook runs the sweep, so managed Dreaming no longer replays 在 later heartbeats 之后 the scheduled run was already consumed. (#66139) Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-core: require a live queued Dreaming cron event before the heartbeat hook runs the sweep, so managed Dreaming no longer replays on later heartbeats after the scheduled run was already consumed. (#66139) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: 内存/active-内存: move recalled 内存 onto the hidden untrusted prompt-prefix 路径 而不是 system prompt injection, label the visible Active 内存 status line fields, 和 include the resolved recall provider/模型 在 网关 debug logs so trace/debug output matches what the 模型 actually saw. changes.title: 内存/Active 内存: 添加 a new optional Active 内存 插件 that gives OpenClaw a dedicated 内存 sub-Agent right 之前 the main reply, so ongoing chats can automatically pull 在 relevant preferences, context, 和 past details 不适用 making users remember to manually say "remember this" 或 "search 内存" first. Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides 为了 tuning, 和 opt-在 transcript persistence 为了 debugging. (#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/Active Memory: add a new optional Active Memory plugin that gives OpenClaw a dedicated memory sub-agent right before the main reply, so ongoing chats can automatically pull in relevant preferences, context, and past details without making users remember to manually say "remember this" or "search memory" first. Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides for tuning, and opt-in transcript persistence for debugging. (#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.

(#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.

Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides for tuning, and opt-in transcript persistence for debugging. (#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Dreaming: consume managed heartbeat events exactly once, stage light-sleep confidence 从 all recorded short-term signals, wake scheduled jobs immediately, raise dreaming-only promotion enough to cross the durable-内存 gate, 和 停止 dreaming 从 re-ingesting its own narrative transcripts.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming: consume managed heartbeat events exactly once, stage light-sleep confidence from all recorded short-term signals, wake scheduled jobs immediately, raise dreaming-only promotion enough to cross the durable-memory gate, and stop dreaming from re-ingesting its own narrative transcripts.

changes.title: Dreaming/narrative: harden transient narrative cleanup 通过 retrying timed-out deletes, scrubbing stale dreaming session artifacts through the lock-aware session-store 路径, 和 isolating transient narrative session keys per workspace. (#65320, #61674)
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/narrative: harden transient narrative cleanup by retrying timed-out deletes, scrubbing stale dreaming session artifacts through the lock-aware session-store path, and isolating transient narrative session keys per workspace. (#65320, #61674)

changes.title: 内存/wiki: 保留 Unicode letters, digits, 和 combining marks 在 wiki slugs 和 contradiction clustering, 和 cap Unicode filename segments to safe byte lengths so non-ASCII titles 停止 collapsing 或 overflowing 路径 limits. (#64742) Thanks @zhouhe-xydt.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/wiki: preserve Unicode letters, digits, and combining marks in wiki slugs and contradiction clustering, and cap Unicode filename segments to safe byte lengths so non-ASCII titles stop collapsing or overflowing path limits. (#64742) Thanks @zhouhe-xydt.

changes.title: 内存/short-term recall: 允许 nested daily notes under `内存/**/YYYY-MM-DD.md` to feed short-term recall, while still excluding generated dream reports under `内存/dreaming/**` so dreaming does not promote its own output. (#64682) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/short-term recall: allow nested daily notes under `memory/**/YYYY-MM-DD.md` to feed short-term recall, while still excluding generated dream reports under `memory/dreaming/**` so dreaming does not promote its own output. (#64682) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.

changes.title: 界面/WebChat: hide synthetic transcript-repair 工具 results 从 chat history reloads so internal recovery markers do not leak 进入 visible chat 之后 reconnects. (#65247) Thanks @wangwllu.
changes.rawTitle: UI/WebChat: hide synthetic transcript-repair tool results from chat history reloads so internal recovery markers do not leak into visible chat after reconnects. (#65247) Thanks @wangwllu.

changes.title: WhatsApp/outbound: fall back to the first `mediaUrls` entry 当 `mediaUrl` is empty so 网关 media sends 停止 静默地 dropping attachments that already have a resolved media list. (#64394) Thanks @eric-fr4 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/outbound: fall back to the first `mediaUrls` entry when `mediaUrl` is empty so gateway media sends stop silently dropping attachments that already have a resolved media list. (#64394) Thanks @eric-fr4 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/Discord: 停止 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` 从 rewriting legacy Discord preview-streaming 配置 进入 the nested modern shape, so downgrades can still recover 不适用 hand-editing `channels.Discord.streaming`. (#65035) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/Discord: stop `openclaw doctor --fix` from rewriting legacy Discord preview-streaming config into the nested modern shape, so downgrades can still recover without hand-editing `channels.discord.streaming`. (#65035) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/认证: blank the shipped example 网关 credential 在 `.env.example` 和 fail startup 当 a copied placeholder 令牌 或 password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch 使用 a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: blank the shipped example gateway credential in `.env.example` and fail startup when a copied placeholder token or password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch with a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/active-内存+dreaming: keep active-内存 recall runs 在 the strongest resolved channel, consume managed dreaming heartbeat events exactly once, 停止 dreaming 从 re-ingesting its own narrative transcripts, 和 添加 explicit repair/dedupe recovery flows 在 CLI, 诊断工具, 和 the Dreams 界面.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/active-memory+dreaming: keep active-memory recall runs on the strongest resolved channel, consume managed dreaming heartbeat events exactly once, stop dreaming from re-ingesting its own narrative transcripts, and add explicit repair/dedupe recovery flows in CLI, doctor, and the Dreams UI.

changes.title: Agent/queueing: carry orphaned active-turn user text 进入 the next prompt 之前 repairing transcript ordering, so follow-up messages that arrive mid-run are no longer 静默地 dropped. (#65388) Thanks @adminfedres 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/queueing: carry orphaned active-turn user text into the next prompt before repairing transcript ordering, so follow-up messages that arrive mid-run are no longer silently dropped. (#65388) Thanks @adminfedres and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/keepalive: 停止 marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow 或 backpressured clients do not self-disconnect 使用 `tick 超时` while long-running work is still alive. (#65256) Thanks @100yenadmin 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/keepalive: stop marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow or backpressured clients do not self-disconnect with `tick timeout` while long-running work is still alive. (#65256) Thanks @100yenadmin and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Matrix/mentions: keep room mention gating strict while accepting visible `@displayName` Matrix URI labels, so `requireMention` works 为了 non-OpenClaw Matrix clients 重新. (#64796) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/mentions: keep room mention gating strict while accepting visible `@displayName` Matrix URI labels, so `requireMention` works for non-OpenClaw Matrix clients again. (#64796) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 诊断工具: warn 当 在-disk Agent directories still exist under `~/.openclaw/Agent/<id>/Agent` 但是 the matching `Agent.list[]` entries are missing 从 配置. (#65113) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor: warn when on-disk agent directories still exist under `~/.openclaw/agents/<id>/agent` but the matching `agents.list[]` entries are missing from config. (#65113) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Telegram: route approval button callback queries onto a separate sequentializer lane so 插件 approval clicks can 解决 immediately 而不是 deadlocking behind the blocked Agent turn. (#64979) Thanks @nk3750.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: route approval button callback queries onto a separate sequentializer lane so plugin approval clicks can resolve immediately instead of deadlocking behind the blocked agent turn. (#64979) Thanks @nk3750.

changes.title: Telegram/direct sessions: keep commentary-only assistant fallback payloads out 的 visible direct delivery, so Codex planning chatter cannot leak 进入 Telegram DMs 当 a run has no `final_answer` text.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/direct sessions: keep commentary-only assistant fallback payloads out of visible direct delivery, so Codex planning chatter cannot leak into Telegram DMs when a run has no `final_answer` text.

changes.title: 网关/keepalive: 停止 marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow 或 backpressured clients do not self-disconnect 使用 `tick 超时` while long-running work is still alive. (#65436)
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/keepalive: stop marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow or backpressured clients do not self-disconnect with `tick timeout` while long-running work is still alive. (#65436)

changes.title: 网关/插件: always send a non-empty `idempotencyKey` 为了 插件 subagent runs, so dreaming narrative jobs 停止 failing 网关 schema validation. (#65354) Thanks @CodeForgeNet.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: always send a non-empty `idempotencyKey` for plugin subagent runs, so dreaming narrative jobs stop failing gateway schema validation. (#65354) Thanks @CodeForgeNet.

changes.title: 网关/认证: blank the shipped example 网关 credential 在 `.env.example` 和 fail startup 当 a copied placeholder 令牌 或 password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch 使用 a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: blank the shipped example gateway credential in `.env.example` and fail startup when a copied placeholder token or password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch with a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech.

changes.title: 插件/内存-core dreaming: keep bundled `内存-core` loaded alongside an explicit external 内存 slot owner only 当 that owner enables dreaming, while preserving `插件.slots.内存 = "none"` 禁用 semantics. (#65411) Thanks @pradeep7127.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/memory-core dreaming: keep bundled `memory-core` loaded alongside an explicit external memory slot owner only when that owner enables dreaming, while preserving `plugins.slots.memory = "none"` disable semantics. (#65411) Thanks @pradeep7127.

changes.title: 诊断工具/Discord: 停止 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` 从 rewriting legacy Discord preview-streaming 配置 进入 the nested modern shape, so downgrades can still recover 不适用 hand-editing `channels.Discord.streaming`.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/Discord: stop `openclaw doctor --fix` from rewriting legacy Discord preview-streaming config into the nested modern shape, so downgrades can still recover without hand-editing `channels.discord.streaming`.

changes.title: 诊断工具: warn 当 在-disk Agent directories still exist under `~/.openclaw/Agent/<id>/Agent` 但是 the matching `Agent.list[]` entries are missing 从 配置. (#65113) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor: warn when on-disk agent directories still exist under `~/.openclaw/agents/<id>/agent` but the matching `agents.list[]` entries are missing from config. (#65113) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: CLI/插件: honor `内存-wiki` 当 `插件.允许` is set 为了 `openclaw wiki`, 和 pass the active app 配置 进入 the metadata registrar so 插件-owned wiki commands 解决 the live 插件 配置 而不是 falling back to defaults. (#64779, #65012)
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: honor `memory-wiki` when `plugins.allow` is set for `openclaw wiki`, and pass the active app config into the metadata registrar so plugin-owned wiki commands resolve the live plugin config instead of falling back to defaults. (#64779, #65012)

changes.title: QA/packaging: 停止 packaged QA helpers 从 crashing 当 optional scenario execution 配置 is unavailable, so npm distributions can skip the repo-only scenario pack 不适用 破坏性变更 completion-cache 和 startup paths. (#65118) Thanks @EdderTalmor.
changes.rawTitle: QA/packaging: stop packaged QA helpers from crashing when optional scenario execution config is unavailable, so npm distributions can skip the repo-only scenario pack without breaking completion-cache and startup paths. (#65118) Thanks @EdderTalmor.

changes.title: Media/audio transcription: surface the real provider failure 当 every audio transcription attempt fails, so status output 和 the CLI 停止 collapsing those errors 进入 generic skips. (#65096) Thanks @l0cka.
changes.rawTitle: Media/audio transcription: surface the real provider failure when every audio transcription attempt fails, so status output and the CLI stop collapsing those errors into generic skips. (#65096) Thanks @l0cka.

changes.title: Infra/net: 修复 multipart FormData fields (including `模型`) being 静默地 dropped 当 a guarded runtime fetch body crosses a FormData implementation boundary, restoring OpenAI audio transcription requests that failed 使用 HTTP 400. (#64349) Thanks @petr-sloup.
changes.rawTitle: Infra/net: fix multipart FormData fields (including `model`) being silently dropped when a guarded runtime fetch body crosses a FormData implementation boundary, restoring OpenAI audio transcription requests that failed with HTTP 400. (#64349) Thanks @petr-sloup.

changes.title: Dreaming/diary: use the host local timezone 为了 diary timestamps 当 `dreaming.timezone` is unset, 和 include the timezone abbreviation so `DREAMS.md` 和 the 界面 make local 或 UTC time explicit. (#65034, #65057)
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/diary: use the host local timezone for diary timestamps when `dreaming.timezone` is unset, and include the timezone abbreviation so `DREAMS.md` and the UI make local or UTC time explicit. (#65034, #65057)

changes.title: Dreaming/promotion: raise phase reinforcement enough 为了 repeated dreaming-only revisits to clear the default durable-内存 gate 之后 multiple days, 而不是 stalling just below the score threshold. (#64068) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/promotion: raise phase reinforcement enough for repeated dreaming-only revisits to clear the default durable-memory gate after multiple days, instead of stalling just below the score threshold. (#64068) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Dreaming/light-sleep: compute staged candidate confidence 从 all recorded short-term signals 而不是 recall-only counts, so dreaming-only entries 停止 rendering as `confidence: 0.00`. (#64599) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/light-sleep: compute staged candidate confidence from all recorded short-term signals instead of recall-only counts, so dreaming-only entries stop rendering as `confidence: 0.00`. (#64599) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/内存: restore cached 内存 capability public artifacts 在 插件-registry cache hits so 内存-backed artifact surfaces stay visible 之后 warm loads.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/memory: restore cached memory capability public artifacts on plugin-registry cache hits so memory-backed artifact surfaces stay visible after warm loads.

changes.title: 网关/cron: 保留 requested isolated-Agent 配置 across runtime reloads so subagent jobs 和 heartbeat overrides keep the right workspace 和 heartbeat settings 当 the hot-loaded snapshot is stale.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/cron: preserve requested isolated-agent config across runtime reloads so subagent jobs and heartbeat overrides keep the right workspace and heartbeat settings when the hot-loaded snapshot is stale.

changes.title: Cron/isolated sessions: persist the right transcript 路径 为了 each isolated run, including fresh session rollovers, so cron runs 停止 appending to stale session files.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated sessions: persist the right transcript path for each isolated run, including fresh session rollovers, so cron runs stop appending to stale session files.

changes.title: Discord/网关: clear stale heartbeat timers 之前 reconnecting so zombie 网关 callbacks cannot 崩溃 the process 和 drop 在-flight replies. (#65009) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: clear stale heartbeat timers before reconnecting so zombie gateway callbacks cannot crash the process and drop in-flight replies. (#65009) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.

changes.title: Matrix/mentions: keep room mention gating strict while accepting visible `@displayName` Matrix URI labels, so `requireMention` works 为了 non-OpenClaw Matrix clients 重新. (#64796) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/mentions: keep room mention gating strict while accepting visible `@displayName` Matrix URI labels, so `requireMention` works for non-OpenClaw Matrix clients again. (#64796) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic replay: 保留 immutable signed-thinking replay safety across stored 和 live reruns, keep non-thinking embedded `tool_result` user blocks intact, 和 drop conflicting preserved 工具 IDs 之前 validation so retries 停止 degrading 进入 omitted 工具 calls. (#65126) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic replay: preserve immutable signed-thinking replay safety across stored and live reruns, keep non-thinking embedded `tool_result` user blocks intact, and drop conflicting preserved tool IDs before validation so retries stop degrading into omitted tool calls. (#65126) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 允许 channel sessions 在 the shipped default QMD scope, while still denying groups.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: allow channel sessions in the shipped default QMD scope, while still denying groups.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: 停止 registering the legacy lowercase root 内存 file as a separate default collection, so QMD 现在 prefers `内存.md` 和 the `内存/` tree 不适用 duplicate collection-添加 warnings.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: stop registering the legacy lowercase root memory file as a separate default collection, so QMD now prefers `MEMORY.md` and the `memory/` tree without duplicate collection-add warnings.

changes.title: 内存/内存-core: watch the `内存` directory directly 和 ignore non-markdown churn so nested note changes still sync 在 macOS + Node 25 environments where recursive `内存/**/*.md` glob watching fails. (#64711) Thanks @jasonxargs-boop 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/memory-core: watch the `memory` directory directly and ignore non-markdown churn so nested note changes still sync on macOS + Node 25 environments where recursive `memory/**/*.md` glob watching fails. (#64711) Thanks @jasonxargs-boop and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: WhatsApp: centralize per-account connection ownership so reconnects, login recovery, 和 outbound readiness stay attached to the live socket 而不是 drifting across monitor 和 login paths. (#65290) Thanks @mcaxtr 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: centralize per-account connection ownership so reconnects, login recovery, and outbound readiness stay attached to the live socket instead of drifting across monitor and login paths. (#65290) Thanks @mcaxtr and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: iMessage: 重试 transient `watch.subscribe` startup failures 之前 tearing down the monitor, 和 sanitize startup 错误 logging so brief local transport stalls do not immediately bounce the channel 或 leak raw imsg RPC payloads 进入 logs. (#65393) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: iMessage: retry transient `watch.subscribe` startup failures before tearing down the monitor, and sanitize startup error logging so brief local transport stalls do not immediately bounce the channel or leak raw imsg RPC payloads into logs. (#65393) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/audio providers: report env-authenticated providers as configured 在 `openclaw infer audio providers --json`, while keeping trusted workspace provider env lookup defaults stable 期间 认证 setup. (#65491)
changes.rawTitle: CLI/audio providers: report env-authenticated providers as configured in `openclaw infer audio providers --json`, while keeping trusted workspace provider env lookup defaults stable during auth setup. (#65491)

changes.title: 插件/install: reinstall bundled runtime packages 当 the matching platform native optional child is missing, so packaged Windows installs can recover dependencies that were packed 在 another host OS.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reinstall bundled runtime packages when the matching platform native optional child is missing, so packaged Windows installs can recover dependencies that were packed on another host OS.

items.title: 插件/loading: narrow CLI, provider, 和 channel activation to manifest-declared needs, 保留 explicit scope 和 trust boundaries, 和 centralize manifest-owner policy so startup, 命令 discovery, 和 runtime activation 避免 loading unrelated 插件 runtime. (#65120, #65259, #65298, #65429, #65459) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/loading: narrow CLI, provider, and channel activation to manifest-declared needs, preserve explicit scope and trust boundaries, and centralize manifest-owner policy so startup, command discovery, and runtime activation avoid loading unrelated plugin runtime. items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated sessions: persist the right transcript path for each isolated run, including fresh session rollovers, so cron runs stop appending to stale session files.

items.title: Docs/内存-wiki: 添加 the recommended QMD + bridge-mode hybrid recipe plus zero-artifact troubleshooting guidance 为了 `内存-wiki` bridge setups. (#63165) Thanks @sercada 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Docs/memory-wiki: add the recommended QMD + bridge-mode hybrid recipe plus zero-artifact troubleshooting guidance for `memory-wiki` bridge setups. (#63165) Thanks @sercada and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/wiki: 保留 Unicode letters, digits, 和 combining marks 在 wiki slugs 和 contradiction clustering, 和 cap Unicode filename segments to safe byte lengths so non-ASCII titles 停止 collapsing 或 overflowing 路径 limits. (#64742) Thanks @zhouhe-xydt.
items.rawTitle: Memory/wiki: preserve Unicode letters, digits, and combining marks in wiki slugs and contradiction clustering, and cap Unicode filename segments to safe byte lengths so non-ASCII titles stop collapsing or overflowing path limits. (#64742) Thanks @zhouhe-xydt.

items.title: 网关/认证: blank the shipped example 网关 credential 在 `.env.example` 和 fail startup 当 a copied placeholder 令牌 或 password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch 使用 a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: blank the shipped example gateway credential in `.env.example` and fail startup when a copied placeholder token or password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch with a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/认证: blank the shipped example 网关 credential 在 `.env.example` 和 fail startup 当 a copied placeholder 令牌 或 password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch 使用 a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: blank the shipped example gateway credential in `.env.example` and fail startup when a copied placeholder token or password is still configured, so operators cannot accidentally launch with a publicly known secret. (#64586) Thanks @navarrotech.

items.title: 插件/内存-core dreaming: keep bundled `内存-core` loaded alongside an explicit external 内存 slot owner only 当 that owner enables dreaming, while preserving `插件.slots.内存 = "none"` 禁用 semantics. (#65411) Thanks @pradeep7127.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/memory-core dreaming: keep bundled `memory-core` loaded alongside an explicit external memory slot owner only when that owner enables dreaming, while preserving `plugins.slots.memory = "none"` disable semantics. (#65411) Thanks @pradeep7127.

items.title: Dreaming/diary: use the host local timezone 为了 diary timestamps 当 `dreaming.timezone` is unset, 和 include the timezone abbreviation so `DREAMS.md` 和 the 界面 make local 或 UTC time explicit. (#65034, #65057)
items.rawTitle: Dreaming/diary: use the host local timezone for diary timestamps when `dreaming.timezone` is unset, and include the timezone abbreviation so `DREAMS.md` and the UI make local or UTC time explicit. (#65034, #65057)

items.title: 插件/install: reinstall bundled runtime packages 当 the matching platform native optional child is missing, so packaged Windows installs can recover dependencies that were packed 在 another host OS.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reinstall bundled runtime packages when the matching platform native optional child is missing, so packaged Windows installs can recover dependencies that were packed on another host OS.

items.title: CLI/更新: respawn tracked 插件 refresh 从 the 已更新 entrypoint 之后 package self-updates so `openclaw 更新` stops failing 在 stale hashed `dist/install.runtime-*.js` chunk imports. (#65471)
items.rawTitle: CLI/update: respawn tracked plugin refresh from the updated entrypoint after package self-updates so `openclaw update` stops failing on stale hashed `dist/install.runtime-*.js` chunk imports. (#65471)

items.title: 网关/插件: always send a non-empty `idempotencyKey` 为了 插件 subagent runs, so dreaming narrative jobs 停止 failing 网关 schema validation. (#65354) Thanks @CodeForgeNet.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: always send a non-empty `idempotencyKey` for plugin subagent runs, so dreaming narrative jobs stop failing gateway schema validation. (#65354) Thanks @CodeForgeNet.

items.title: CLI/插件: honor `内存-wiki` 当 `插件.允许` is set 为了 `openclaw wiki`, 和 pass the active app 配置 进入 the metadata registrar so 插件-owned wiki commands 解决 the live 插件 配置 而不是 falling back to defaults. (#64779, #65012)
items.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: honor `memory-wiki` when `plugins.allow` is set for `openclaw wiki`, and pass the active app config into the metadata registrar so plugin-owned wiki commands resolve the live plugin config instead of falling back to defaults. (#64779, #65012)

items.title: 插件/内存: restore cached 内存 capability public artifacts 在 插件-registry cache hits so 内存-backed artifact surfaces stay visible 之后 warm loads.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/memory: restore cached memory capability public artifacts on plugin-registry cache hits so memory-backed artifact surfaces stay visible after warm loads.

items.title: 界面/WebChat: hide synthetic transcript-repair 工具 results 从 chat history reloads so internal recovery markers do not leak 进入 visible chat 之后 reconnects. (#65247) Thanks @wangwllu.
items.rawTitle: UI/WebChat: hide synthetic transcript-repair tool results from chat history reloads so internal recovery markers do not leak into visible chat after reconnects. (#65247) Thanks @wangwllu.

items.title: Dreaming/promotion: raise phase reinforcement enough 为了 repeated dreaming-only revisits to clear the default durable-内存 gate 之后 multiple days, 而不是 stalling just below the score threshold. (#64068) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Dreaming/promotion: raise phase reinforcement enough for repeated dreaming-only revisits to clear the default durable-memory gate after multiple days, instead of stalling just below the score threshold. (#64068) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/QMD: 停止 registering the legacy lowercase root 内存 file as a separate default collection, so QMD 现在 prefers `内存.md` 和 the `内存/` tree 不适用 duplicate collection-添加 warnings.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: stop registering the legacy lowercase root memory file as a separate default collection, so QMD now prefers `MEMORY.md` and the `memory/` tree without duplicate collection-add warnings.

items.title: 内存/内存-core: watch the `内存` directory directly 和 ignore non-markdown churn so nested note changes still sync 在 macOS + Node 25 environments where recursive `内存/**/*.md` glob watching fails. (#64711) Thanks @jasonxargs-boop 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Memory/memory-core: watch the `memory` directory directly and ignore non-markdown churn so nested note changes still sync on macOS + Node 25 environments where recursive `memory/**/*.md` glob watching fails. (#64711) Thanks @jasonxargs-boop and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/keepalive: 停止 marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow 或 backpressured clients do not self-disconnect 使用 `tick 超时` while long-running work is still alive. (#65256) Thanks @100yenadmin 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/keepalive: stop marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow or backpressured clients do not self-disconnect with `tick timeout` while long-running work is still alive. (#65256) Thanks @100yenadmin and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/keepalive: 停止 marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow 或 backpressured clients do not self-disconnect 使用 `tick 超时` while long-running work is still alive. (#65436)
items.rawTitle: Gateway/keepalive: stop marking WebSocket tick broadcasts as droppable so slow or backpressured clients do not self-disconnect with `tick timeout` while long-running work is still alive. (#65436)

items.title: QA/packaging: 停止 packaged QA helpers 从 crashing 当 optional scenario execution 配置 is unavailable, so npm distributions can skip the repo-only scenario pack 不适用 破坏性变更 completion-cache 和 startup paths. (#65118) Thanks @EdderTalmor.
items.rawTitle: QA/packaging: stop packaged QA helpers from crashing when optional scenario execution config is unavailable, so npm distributions can skip the repo-only scenario pack without breaking completion-cache and startup paths. (#65118) Thanks @EdderTalmor.

items.title: 诊断工具: warn 当 在-disk Agent directories still exist under `~/.openclaw/Agent/<id>/Agent` 但是 the matching `Agent.list[]` entries are missing 从 配置. (#65113) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
items.rawTitle: Doctor: warn when on-disk agent directories still exist under `~/.openclaw/agents/<id>/agent` but the matching `agents.list[]` entries are missing from config. (#65113) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
