items.title: 网关/cron: 保留 requested isolated-Agent 配置 across runtime reloads so subagent jobs 和 heartbeat overrides keep the right workspace 和 heartbeat settings 当 the hot-loaded snapshot is stale.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/cron: preserve requested isolated-agent config across runtime reloads so subagent jobs and heartbeat overrides keep the right workspace and heartbeat settings when the hot-loaded snapshot is stale.

items.title: Infra/net: 修复 multipart FormData fields (including `模型`) being 静默地 dropped 当 a guarded runtime fetch body crosses a FormData implementation boundary, restoring OpenAI audio transcription requests that failed 使用 HTTP 400. (#64349) Thanks @petr-sloup.
items.rawTitle: Infra/net: fix multipart FormData fields (including `model`) being silently dropped when a guarded runtime fetch body crosses a FormData implementation boundary, restoring OpenAI audio transcription requests that failed with HTTP 400. (#64349) Thanks @petr-sloup.

items.title: Agent/Anthropic replay: 保留 immutable signed-thinking replay safety across stored 和 live reruns, keep non-thinking embedded `tool_result` user blocks intact, 和 drop conflicting preserved 工具 IDs 之前 validation so retries 停止 degrading 进入 omitted 工具 calls. (#65126) Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic replay: preserve immutable signed-thinking replay safety across stored and live reruns, keep non-thinking embedded `tool_result` user blocks intact, and drop conflicting preserved tool IDs before validation so retries stop degrading into omitted tool calls. (#65126) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Dreaming/内存-wiki: 添加 ChatGPT import ingestion plus new `Imported Insights` 和 `内存 Palace` diary subtabs so Dreaming can inspect imported source chats, compiled wiki pages, 和 full source pages directly 从 the 界面. (#64505)
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-wiki: add ChatGPT import ingestion plus new `Imported Insights` and `Memory Palace` diary subtabs so Dreaming can inspect imported source chats, compiled wiki pages, and full source pages directly from the UI. (#64505)

changes.title: Control 界面/webchat: render assistant media/reply/语音 directives as structured chat bubbles, 添加 the `[embed ...]` rich output tag, 和 gate external embed URLs behind 配置. (#64104)
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/webchat: render assistant media/reply/voice directives as structured chat bubbles, add the `[embed ...]` rich output tag, and gate external embed URLs behind config. (#64104)

changes.title: Tools/video_generate: 添加 URL-only generated asset delivery, typed `providerOptions`, reference audio inputs, per-asset role hints, `adaptive` aspect-ratio 支持, 和 a higher image-input cap so video providers can expose richer generation modes 不适用 forcing large files 进入 内存. (#61987, #61988) Thanks @xieyongliang.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/video_generate: add URL-only generated asset delivery, typed `providerOptions`, reference audio inputs, per-asset role hints, `adaptive` aspect-ratio support, and a higher image-input cap so video providers can expose richer generation modes without forcing large files into memory. (#61987, #61988) Thanks @xieyongliang.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu: improve document comment sessions with richer context parsing, comment reactions, and typing feedback so document-thread conversations behave more like chat conversations. (#63785)

changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams: add reaction support, reaction listing, Graph pagination, and delegated OAuth setup for sending reactions while preserving application-auth read paths. (#51646)

changes.title: 插件: 允许 插件 manifests to declare activation 和 setup descriptors so 插件 setup flows can describe required 认证, pairing, 和 configuration steps 不适用 hardcoded core special cases. (#64780)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: allow plugin manifests to declare activation and setup descriptors so plugin setup flows can describe required auth, pairing, and configuration steps without hardcoded core special cases. (#64780)

changes.title: Ollama: cache `/API/show` context-window 和 capability metadata 期间 模型 discovery so repeated picker refreshes 停止 refetching unchanged 模型, while still retrying 之后 empty responses 和 invalidating 在 digest changes. (#64753) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama: cache `/api/show` context-window and capability metadata during model discovery so repeated picker refreshes stop refetching unchanged models, while still retrying after empty responses and invalidating on digest changes. (#64753) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: 模型/providers: surface how configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints are classified 在 embedded-Agent debug logs, so local 和 代理 routing issues are easier to diagnose. (#64754) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Models/providers: surface how configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints are classified in embedded-agent debug logs, so local and proxy routing issues are easier to diagnose. (#64754) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: QA/parity: 添加 the GPT-5.4 vs Opus 4.6 agentic parity report gate 使用 shared scenario coverage checks, stricter evidence heuristics, 和 skipped-scenario accounting 为了 maintainer review. (#64441) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: QA/parity: add the GPT-5.4 vs Opus 4.6 agentic parity report gate with shared scenario coverage checks, stricter evidence heuristics, and skipped-scenario accounting for maintainer review. (#64441) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex OAuth认证: 停止 rewriting the upstream authorize URL scopes so new Codex sign-ins do not fail 使用 `invalid_scope` 之前 returning an authorization code. (#64713) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex OAuth: stop rewriting the upstream authorize URL scopes so new Codex sign-ins do not fail with `invalid_scope` before returning an authorization code. (#64713) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: Audio transcription: 禁用 pinned DNS only 为了 OpenAI-compatible multipart requests, while still validating hostnames, so OpenAI, Groq, 和 Mistral transcription works 重新 不适用 weakening other request paths. (#64766) Thanks @GodsBoy.
changes.rawTitle: Audio transcription: disable pinned DNS only for OpenAI-compatible multipart requests, while still validating hostnames, so OpenAI, Groq, and Mistral transcription works again without weakening other request paths. (#64766) Thanks @GodsBoy.

changes.title: macOS/Talk Mode: 之后 granting microphone permission 在 first 启用, continue starting Talk Mode 而不是 requiring a second toggle. (#62459) Thanks @ggarber.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/Talk Mode: after granting microphone permission on first enable, continue starting Talk Mode instead of requiring a second toggle. (#62459) Thanks @ggarber.

changes.title: Control 界面/webchat: persist Agent-run TTS audio replies 进入 webchat history 和 保留 interleaved 工具 card pairing so generated audio 和 mixed 工具 output stay attached to the right messages. (#63514) Thanks @bittoby.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/webchat: persist agent-run TTS audio replies into webchat history and preserve interleaved tool card pairing so generated audio and mixed tool output stay attached to the right messages. (#63514) Thanks @bittoby.

changes.title: WhatsApp: honor the configured default account 当 the active listener helper is used 不适用 an explicit account id, so named default accounts do not get registered under `default`. (#53918) Thanks @yhyatt.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: honor the configured default account when the active listener helper is used without an explicit account id, so named default accounts do not get registered under `default`. (#53918) Thanks @yhyatt.

changes.title: ACP/Agent: suppress commentary-phase child assistant relay text 在 ACP parent stream updates, so spawned child runs 停止 leaking internal progress chatter 进入 the parent session. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/agents: suppress commentary-phase child assistant relay text in ACP parent stream updates, so spawned child runs stop leaking internal progress chatter into the parent session. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/timeouts: honor explicit run timeouts 在 the LLM idle watchdog 和 align default 超时 配置 so slow 模型 can keep working until the configured limit 而不是 using the wrong idle window.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: honor explicit run timeouts in the LLM idle watchdog and align default timeout config so slow models can keep working until the configured limit instead of using the wrong idle window.

changes.title: Google/Veo: 停止 sending the unsupported `numberOfVideos` request field so Gemini Developer API Veo runs do not fail 之前 OpenClaw can complete the intended Google video generation 路径. (#64723) Thanks @velvet-shark.

items.rawTitle: MiniMax/OAuth: write `api: "anthropic-messages"` and `authHeader: true` into the `minimax-portal` config patch during `openclaw configure`, so re-authenticated portal setups keep Bearer auth routing working. (#64964) Thanks @ryanlee666.

items.title: Ollama: cache `/API/show` context-window 和 capability metadata 期间 模型 discovery so repeated picker refreshes 停止 refetching unchanged 模型, while still retrying 之后 empty responses 和 invalidating 在 digest changes. (#64753) Thanks @ImLukeF.
items.rawTitle: Ollama: cache `/api/show` context-window and capability metadata during model discovery so repeated picker refreshes stop refetching unchanged models, while still retrying after empty responses and invalidating on digest changes. (#64753) Thanks @ImLukeF.

items.title: 模型/providers: surface how configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints are classified 在 embedded-Agent debug logs, so local 和 代理 routing issues are easier to diagnose. (#64754) Thanks @ImLukeF.
items.rawTitle: Models/providers: surface how configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints are classified in embedded-agent debug logs, so local and proxy routing issues are easier to diagnose. (#64754) Thanks @ImLukeF.

items.title: OpenAI/Codex OAuth认证: 停止 rewriting the upstream authorize URL scopes so new Codex sign-ins do not fail 使用 `invalid_scope` 之前 returning an authorization code. (#64713) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
items.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex OAuth: stop rewriting the upstream authorize URL scopes so new Codex sign-ins do not fail with `invalid_scope` before returning an authorization code. (#64713) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

items.title: Audio transcription: 禁用 pinned DNS only 为了 OpenAI-compatible multipart requests, while still validating hostnames, so OpenAI, Groq, 和 Mistral transcription works 重新 不适用 weakening other request paths. (#64766) Thanks @GodsBoy.
items.rawTitle: Audio transcription: disable pinned DNS only for OpenAI-compatible multipart requests, while still validating hostnames, so OpenAI, Groq, and Mistral transcription works again without weakening other request paths. (#64766) Thanks @GodsBoy.

items.title: Codex/QA: keep Codex app-server coordination chatter out 的 visible replies, 添加 a live QA leak scenario, 和 classify leaked harness meta text as a QA failure 而不是 a successful reply. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: QA/parity: 添加 the GPT-5.4 vs Opus 4.6 agentic parity report gate 使用 shared scenario coverage checks, stricter evidence heuristics, 和 skipped-scenario accounting 为了 maintainer review. (#64441) Thanks @100yenadmin.
items.rawTitle: QA/parity: add the GPT-5.4 vs Opus 4.6 agentic parity report gate with shared scenario coverage checks, stricter evidence heuristics, and skipped-scenario accounting for maintainer review. (#64441) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: 模型/Codex: 添加 the bundled Codex provider 和 插件-owned app-server harness so `Codex/gpt-*` 模型 use Codex-managed 认证, native threads, 模型 discovery, 和 compaction while `OpenAI/gpt-*` stays 在 the normal OpenAI provider 路径. (#64298)
changes.rawTitle: Models/Codex: add the bundled Codex provider and plugin-owned app-server harness so `codex/gpt-*` models use Codex-managed auth, native threads, model discovery, and compaction while `openai/gpt-*` stays on the normal OpenAI provider path. (#64298)

changes.title: 内存/Active 内存: 添加 a new optional Active 内存 插件 that gives OpenClaw a dedicated 内存 sub-Agent right 之前 the main reply, so ongoing chats can automatically pull 在 relevant preferences, context, 和 past details 不适用 making users remember to manually say "remember this" 或 "search 内存" first. Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides 为了 tuning, 和 opt-在 transcript persistence 为了 debugging. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/active-内存. (#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/Active Memory: add a new optional Active Memory plugin that gives OpenClaw a dedicated memory sub-agent right before the main reply, so ongoing chats can automatically pull in relevant preferences, context, and past details without making users remember to manually say "remember this" or "search memory" first. Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides for tuning, and opt-in transcript persistence for debugging. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/active-memory. (#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.

(#64050)

changes.title: 网关/startup: keep WebSocket RPC available while channels 和 插件 sidecars start, hold `chat.history` unavailable until startup sidecars finish so synchronous history reads cannot stall startup (reported 在 #63450), refresh advertised 网关 methods 之后 deferred 插件 reloads, 和 enforce the pre-认证 WebSocket upgrade budget 之前 the no-handler 503 路径 so upgrade floods cannot bypass connection limits 期间 that window. (#63480) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: WhatsApp: keep inbound replies, media, composing indicators, 和 queued outbound deliveries attached to the current socket across reconnect gaps, including fresh 重试-eligible sends 之后 the listener comes back. (#30806, #46299, #62892, #63916) Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: Windows/exec: settle supervisor waits 从 child exit state 之后 stdout 和 stderr drain even 当 `close` never arrives, so CLI commands 停止 hanging 或 dying 使用 forced `SIGKILL` 在 Windows. (#64072) Thanks @obviyus.

Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides 为了 tuning, 和 opt-在 transcript persistence 为了 debugging. Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides for tuning, and opt-in transcript persistence for debugging. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: 插件 SDK/命令 认证: split 命令 status builders onto the lightweight `openclaw/插件-sdk/命令-status` subpath while preserving deprecated `命令-认证` compatibility exports, so 认证-only 插件 imports no longer pull status/context warmup 进入 CLI onboarding paths. (#63174) Thanks @hxy91819.
items.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/command auth: split command status builders onto the lightweight `openclaw/plugin-sdk/command-status` subpath while preserving deprecated `command-auth` compatibility exports, so auth-only plugin imports no longer pull status/context warmup into CLI onboarding paths. (#63174) Thanks @hxy91819.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: 添加 a grounded REM backfill lane 使用 historical `rem-harness --路径`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, 和 live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay 进入 Dreams 和 durable 内存 不适用 a second 内存 stack. Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: add a grounded REM backfill lane with historical `rem-harness --path`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, and live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay into Dreams and durable memory without a second memory stack. Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面/dreaming: 添加 a structured diary view 使用 timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, 和 a grounded Scene lane 使用 promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action 为了 staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/dreaming: add a structured diary view with timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, and a grounded Scene lane with promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action for staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: QA/lab: 添加 character-vibes evaluation reports 使用 模型 selection 和 parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.
changes.rawTitle: QA/lab: add character-vibes evaluation reports with model selection and parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.

changes.title: 插件/provider-认证: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, 认证 profiles, 配置-backed 认证, 和 API-密钥 onboarding choices 不适用 core-specific wiring.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/provider-auth: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, auth profiles, config-backed auth, and API-key onboarding choices without core-specific wiring.

changes.title: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer 在 `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration 在 the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next 网关 version, 和 添加 the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --从-网关` workflow 为了 release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer in `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration on the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next gateway version, and add the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --from-gateway` workflow for release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 浏览器/安全: re-run blocked-destination safety checks 之后 interaction-driven main-frame navigations 从 click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, 和 batched action flows, so 浏览器 interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine 当 they land 在 forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/security: re-run blocked-destination safety checks after interaction-driven main-frame navigations from click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, and batched action flows, so browser interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine when they land on forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 安全/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus 浏览器-control override 和 skip-server env vars 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files, 和 reject unsafe URL-style 浏览器 control override specifiers 之前 lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus browser-control override and skip-server env vars from untrusted workspace `.env` files, and reject unsafe URL-style browser control override specifiers before lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, 和 `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events 和 sanitize node-provided 命令/output/reason text 之前 enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content 进入 later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, and `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events and sanitize node-provided command/output/reason text before enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content into later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding 认证 choices: 防止 untrusted workspace 插件 从 colliding 使用 bundled provider 认证-choice ids 期间 non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out 的 untrusted workspace 插件 handlers unless those 插件 are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding auth choices: prevent untrusted workspace plugins from colliding with bundled provider auth-choice ids during non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out of untrusted workspace plugin handlers unless those plugins are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 安全/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` 为了 the CRLF 命令-injection 修复 和 bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` 在 production resolution paths.
changes.rawTitle: Security/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` for the CRLF command-injection fix and bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` in production resolution paths.

changes.title: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code 认证 在 new QR scans, bootstrap operator 和 node sessions 从 fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens 之后 bootstrap handoff, 和 pause pairing auto-重试 while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably 重新. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code auth on new QR scans, bootstrap operator and node sessions from fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens after bootstrap handoff, and pause pairing auto-retry while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably again. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Matrix/网关: wait 为了 Matrix sync readiness 之前 marking startup successful, keep Matrix background handler failures contained, 和 route fatal Matrix sync stops through channel-level restart handling 而不是 crashing the whole 网关. (#62779) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/gateway: wait for Matrix sync readiness before marking startup successful, keep Matrix background handler failures contained, and route fatal Matrix sync stops through channel-level restart handling instead of crashing the whole gateway. (#62779) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Slack/media: 保留 bearer 认证 across same-origin `files.Slack.com` redirects while still stripping it 在 cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load 重新. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/media: preserve bearer auth across same-origin `files.slack.com` redirects while still stripping it on cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load again. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Reply/诊断工具: use the active runtime snapshot 为了 queued reply runs, 解决 reply-run SecretRefs 之前 preflight helpers touch 配置, surface 网关 OAuth认证 reauth failures to users, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Reply/doctor: use the active runtime snapshot for queued reply runs, resolve reply-run SecretRefs before preflight helpers touch config, surface gateway OAuth reauth failures to users, and make `openclaw doctor` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面: guard stale session-history reloads 期间 fast session switches so the selected session 和 rendered transcript stay 在 sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: guard stale session-history reloads during fast session switches so the selected session and rendered transcript stay in sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/chat: suppress exact 和 streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates 和 history sanitization so internal Agent-to-Agent control tokens no longer leak 进入 user-facing 网关 chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: suppress exact and streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates and history sanitization so internal agent-to-agent control tokens no longer leak into user-facing gateway chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

changes.title: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens 之前 reply normalization 和 ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks 进入 user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens before reply normalization and ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks into user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: Sessions/routing: 保留 established external routes 在 inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery 从 Telegram, Discord, 或 other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/routing: preserve established external routes on inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery from Telegram, Discord, or other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned 模型 overrides 在 `/reset` 和 `/new` while still preserving explicit user 模型 selections, including legacy sessions created 之前 override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned model overrides on `/reset` and `/new` while still preserving explicit user model selections, including legacy sessions created before override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: Slack/ACP: treat Slack ACP block replies as visible delivered output so OpenClaw stops re-sending the final fallback text 之后 Slack already rendered the reply. (#62858) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/ACP: treat Slack ACP block replies as visible delivered output so OpenClaw stops re-sending the final fallback text after Slack already rendered the reply. (#62858) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Slack/partial streaming: 密钥 turn-local dedupe 通过 dispatch kind 和 keep the final fallback reply 路径 active 当 preview finalization fails so stale preview text cannot suppress the actual final answer. (#62859) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/partial streaming: key turn-local dedupe by dispatch kind and keep the final fallback reply path active when preview finalization fails so stale preview text cannot suppress the actual final answer. (#62859) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/诊断工具: migrate legacy `channels.matrix.dm.policy: "trusted"` configs back to compatible DM policies 期间 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, preserving explicit `allowFrom` boundaries as `allowlist` 和 defaulting empty legacy configs to `pairing`. (#62942) Thanks @lukeboyett.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/doctor: migrate legacy `channels.matrix.dm.policy: "trusted"` configs back to compatible DM policies during `openclaw doctor --fix`, preserving explicit `allowFrom` boundaries as `allowlist` and defaulting empty legacy configs to `pairing`. (#62942) Thanks @lukeboyett.

changes.title: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors 从 manifests 和 built chunks, 和 test packed release tarballs 不适用 repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast 在 missing 插件 deps 而不是 crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors from manifests and built chunks, and test packed release tarballs without repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast on missing plugin deps instead of crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: QA/live 认证: fail fast 当 live QA scenarios hit classified 认证 或 runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, 和 sanitize missing-密钥 guidance so 网关 认证 problems surface as actionable errors 而不是 timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: QA/live auth: fail fast when live QA scenarios hit classified auth or runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, and sanitize missing-key guidance so gateway auth problems surface as actionable errors instead of timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` 在 OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, 和 compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` on OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, and compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 允许 Ollama 模型 using the native `API: "ollama"` 路径 to optionally display thinking output 当 `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: allow Ollama models using the native `api: "ollama"` path to optionally display thinking output when `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.

changes.title: Codex CLI: pass OpenClaw's system prompt through Codex's `model_instructions_file` 配置 override so fresh Codex CLI sessions receive the same prompt guidance as Claude CLI sessions.
changes.rawTitle: Codex CLI: pass OpenClaw's system prompt through Codex's `model_instructions_file` config override so fresh Codex CLI sessions receive the same prompt guidance as Claude CLI sessions.

changes.title: 认证/profiles: persist explicit 认证-profile upserts directly 和 skip external CLI sync 为了 local writes so profile changes are saved 不适用 stale external credential state.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/profiles: persist explicit auth-profile upserts directly and skip external CLI sync for local writes so profile changes are saved without stale external credential state.

changes.title: Agent/timeouts: make the LLM idle 超时 inherit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` 当 configured, 禁用 the unconfigured idle watchdog 为了 cron runs, 和 point idle-超时 errors at `Agent.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: make the LLM idle timeout inherit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` when configured, disable the unconfigured idle watchdog for cron runs, and point idle-timeout errors at `agents.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.

changes.title: Agent/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing 和 `1113` as 认证, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors 停止 falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing and `1113` as auth, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors stop falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.

changes.title: QQBot/media-tags: 支持 HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes 在 attributes, 和 self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are 正确地 parsed 和 normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/media-tags: support HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes in attributes, and self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are correctly parsed and normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, 和 diary action classification 通过 preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing 或 symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings 在 网关 backfills, 和 tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, and diary action classification by preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing or symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings in gateway backfills, and tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: accept embedded heartbeat trigger tokens so light 和 REM dreaming still run 当 runtime wrappers include extra heartbeat text.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: accept embedded heartbeat trigger tokens so light and REM dreaming still run when runtime wrappers include extra heartbeat text.

changes.title: Android/manual connect: 允许 blank port input only 为了 TLS manual 网关 endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` 不适用 静默地 changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.
changes.rawTitle: Android/manual connect: allow blank port input only for TLS manual gateway endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` without silently changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.

changes.title: Windows/更新: 添加 heap headroom to Windows `pnpm build` steps 期间 dev updates so 更新 preflight builds 停止 failing 在 low default Node 内存.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/update: add heap headroom to Windows `pnpm build` steps during dev updates so update preflight builds stop failing on low default Node memory.

items.title: 插件/provider-认证: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, 认证 profiles, 配置-backed 认证, 和 API-密钥 onboarding choices 不适用 core-specific wiring.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/provider-auth: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, auth profiles, config-backed auth, and API-key onboarding choices without core-specific wiring.

items.title: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer 在 `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration 在 the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next 网关 version, 和 添加 the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --从-网关` workflow 为了 release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.
items.rawTitle: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer in `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration on the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next gateway version, and add the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --from-gateway` workflow for release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.

items.title: 插件/onboarding 认证 choices: 防止 untrusted workspace 插件 从 colliding 使用 bundled provider 认证-choice ids 期间 non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out 的 untrusted workspace 插件 handlers unless those 插件 are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding auth choices: prevent untrusted workspace plugins from colliding with bundled provider auth-choice ids during non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out of untrusted workspace plugin handlers unless those plugins are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 网关/chat: suppress exact 和 streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates 和 history sanitization so internal Agent-to-Agent control tokens no longer leak 进入 user-facing 网关 chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: suppress exact and streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates and history sanitization so internal agent-to-agent control tokens no longer leak into user-facing gateway chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

items.title: 网关/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned 模型 overrides 在 `/reset` 和 `/new` while still preserving explicit user 模型 selections, including legacy sessions created 之前 override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned model overrides on `/reset` and `/new` while still preserving explicit user model selections, including legacy sessions created before override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` 在 OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, 和 compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` on OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, and compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.

items.title: 认证/profiles: persist explicit 认证-profile upserts directly 和 skip external CLI sync 为了 local writes so profile changes are saved 不适用 stale external credential state.
items.rawTitle: Auth/profiles: persist explicit auth-profile upserts directly and skip external CLI sync for local writes so profile changes are saved without stale external credential state.

items.title: 浏览器/安全: re-run blocked-destination safety checks 之后 interaction-driven main-frame navigations 从 click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, 和 batched action flows, so 浏览器 interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine 当 they land 在 forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Browser/security: re-run blocked-destination safety checks after interaction-driven main-frame navigations from click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, and batched action flows, so browser interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine when they land on forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 安全/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus 浏览器-control override 和 skip-server env vars 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files, 和 reject unsafe URL-style 浏览器 control override specifiers 之前 lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus browser-control override and skip-server env vars from untrusted workspace `.env` files, and reject unsafe URL-style browser control override specifiers before lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 网关/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, 和 `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events 和 sanitize node-provided 命令/output/reason text 之前 enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content 进入 later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, and `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events and sanitize node-provided command/output/reason text before enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content into later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 安全/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` 为了 the CRLF 命令-injection 修复 和 bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` 在 production resolution paths.
items.rawTitle: Security/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` for the CRLF command-injection fix and bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` in production resolution paths.

items.title: 内存/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, 和 diary action classification 通过 preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing 或 symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings 在 网关 backfills, 和 tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, and diary action classification by preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing or symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings in gateway backfills, and tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Android/manual connect: 允许 blank port input only 为了 TLS manual 网关 endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` 不适用 静默地 changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.
items.rawTitle: Android/manual connect: allow blank port input only for TLS manual gateway endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` without silently changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.

items.title: Control 界面: guard stale session-history reloads 期间 fast session switches so the selected session 和 rendered transcript stay 在 sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.
items.rawTitle: Control UI: guard stale session-history reloads during fast session switches so the selected session and rendered transcript stay in sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: QA/live 认证: fail fast 当 live QA scenarios hit classified 认证 或 runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, 和 sanitize missing-密钥 guidance so 网关 认证 problems surface as actionable errors 而不是 timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: QA/live auth: fail fast when live QA scenarios hit classified auth or runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, and sanitize missing-key guidance so gateway auth problems surface as actionable errors instead of timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: Agent/timeouts: make the LLM idle 超时 inherit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` 当 configured, 禁用 the unconfigured idle watchdog 为了 cron runs, 和 point idle-超时 errors at `Agent.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.
items.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: make the LLM idle timeout inherit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` when configured, disable the unconfigured idle watchdog for cron runs, and point idle-timeout errors at `agents.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.

items.title: Agent/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing 和 `1113` as 认证, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors 停止 falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.
items.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing and `1113` as auth, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors stop falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.

items.title: QQBot/media-tags: 支持 HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes 在 attributes, 和 self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are 正确地 parsed 和 normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.
items.rawTitle: QQBot/media-tags: support HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes in attributes, and self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are correctly parsed and normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.

items.title: 插件/contracts: keep test-only helpers out 的 production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, 和 harden guardrails so indirect re-exports 和 canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/contracts: keep test-only helpers out of production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, and harden guardrails so indirect re-exports and canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.

items.title: 插件 SDK/命令 认证: split 命令 status builders onto the lightweight `openclaw/插件-sdk/命令-status` subpath while preserving deprecated `命令-认证` compatibility exports, so 认证-only 插件 imports no longer pull status/context warmup 进入 CLI onboarding paths. (#63174) Thanks @hxy91819.
items.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/command auth: split command status builders onto the lightweight `openclaw/plugin-sdk/command-status` subpath while preserving deprecated `command-auth` compatibility exports, so auth-only plugin imports no longer pull status/context warmup into CLI onboarding paths. (#63174) Thanks @hxy91819.

changes.title: Telegram/setup: load setup 和 secret contracts through packaged top-level sidecars so installed npm builds no longer try to import missing `dist/extensions/Telegram/src/*` files 期间 网关 startup.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/setup: load setup and secret contracts through packaged top-level sidecars so installed npm builds no longer try to import missing `dist/extensions/telegram/src/*` files during gateway startup.

changes.title: Bundled channels/setup: load shared secret contracts through packaged top-level sidecars across BlueBubbles, 飞书, Google Chat, IRC, Matrix, Mattermost, Microsoft Teams, Nextcloud Talk, Slack, 和 Zalo so installed npm builds no longer rely 在 missing `dist/extensions/*/src/*` files 期间 网关 startup.
changes.rawTitle: Bundled channels/setup: load shared secret contracts through packaged top-level sidecars across BlueBubbles, Feishu, Google Chat, IRC, Matrix, Mattermost, Microsoft Teams, Nextcloud Talk, Slack, and Zalo so installed npm builds no longer rely on missing `dist/extensions/*/src/*` files during gateway startup.

changes.title: Bundled 插件: align packaged 插件 compatibility metadata 使用 the release version so bundled channels 和 providers load 在 OpenClaw 2026.4.8.
changes.rawTitle: Bundled plugins: align packaged plugin compatibility metadata with the release version so bundled channels and providers load on OpenClaw 2026.4.8.

changes.title: Agent/progress: keep `update_plan` available 为了 OpenAI-family runs while returning compact success payloads 和 allowing `tools.experimental.planTool=false` to opt out.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/progress: keep `update_plan` available for OpenAI-family runs while returning compact success payloads and allowing `tools.experimental.planTool=false` to opt out.

changes.title: Agent/exec: keep `/exec` current-default reporting aligned 使用 real runtime behavior so `host=auto` sessions surface the correct host-aware fallback policy (`full/off` 在 网关 或 node, `deny/off` 在 sandbox) 而不是 stale stricter defaults.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/exec: keep `/exec` current-default reporting aligned with real runtime behavior so `host=auto` sessions surface the correct host-aware fallback policy (`full/off` on gateway or node, `deny/off` on sandbox) instead of stale stricter defaults.

changes.title: Slack: honor ambient HTTP(S) 代理 settings 为了 Socket Mode WebSocket connections, including NO_PROXY exclusions, so 代理-only deployments can connect 不适用 a monkey patch. (#62878) Thanks @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: honor ambient HTTP(S) proxy settings for Socket Mode WebSocket connections, including NO_PROXY exclusions, so proxy-only deployments can connect without a monkey patch. (#62878) Thanks @mjamiv.

changes.title: Slack/actions: pass the already resolved read 令牌 进入 `downloadFile` so SecretRef-backed bot tokens no longer fail 之后 a raw 配置 re-read. (#62097) Thanks @martingarramon.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/actions: pass the already resolved read token into `downloadFile` so SecretRef-backed bot tokens no longer fail after a raw config re-read. (#62097) Thanks @martingarramon.

changes.title: Network/fetch guard: skip target DNS pinning 当 trusted env-代理 mode is active so 代理-only sandboxes can let the trusted 代理 解决 outbound hosts. (#59007) Thanks @cluster2600.
changes.rawTitle: Network/fetch guard: skip target DNS pinning when trusted env-proxy mode is active so proxy-only sandboxes can let the trusted proxy resolve outbound hosts. (#59007) Thanks @cluster2600.
